title_id: Hadis Ketiga: Syarat Kedelapan Syahadat — Mengingkari Semua Sesembahan Selain Allah dan Syahadat kepada Risalah Muhammad
content_id:
Jika seseorang tidak memiliki kecintaan terhadap syahadat ini atau jika ia sebenarnya merasakan kebencian terhadapnya maka ia telah membatalkan syahadat-nya. Orang beriman yang sejati tidak menempatkan siapa pun sebagai tandingan Allah dalam kecintaannya. Allah berfirman: 'Dan di antara manusia ada orang-orang yang menyembah tandingan-tandingan selain Allah; mereka mencintainya sebagaimana mereka mencintai Allah. Adapun orang-orang yang beriman sangat besar cinta mereka kepada Allah' (al-Baqarah: 165). Nabi bersabda: 'Barang siapa memiliki tiga sifat telah merasakan manisnya iman. Yang pertama dari ketiganya adalah ia mencintai Allah dan Rasul-Nya melebihi kecintaannya kepada siapa pun selain keduanya...' (Diriwayatkan oleh al-Bukhari dan Muslim.)

Syarat kedelapan syahadat adalah bahwa orang yang mengucapkan syahadat harus mengingkari setiap sesembahan selain Allah. Meskipun hal itu jelas dalam kata-kata kesaksian iman namun tidak tampak jelas bagi semua orang yang mengucapkan kesaksian itu. Oleh karena itu perlu disebutkan secara eksplisit. Syahadat bukan sekadar penegasan tetapi juga penegasan sekaligus penafian. Penafian sesembahan palsu adalah bagian penting dari syahadat itu sendiri.

Berkenaan dengan kesaksian bahwa Muhammad adalah Rasulullah: Hal ini berarti pertama bahwa misi Nabi bersifat universal. Allah berfirman: 'Katakanlah wahai Muhammad: Hai manusia sesungguhnya aku adalah utusan Allah kepada kalian semua' (al-A'raf: 158). Nabi bersabda: 'Aku diberi lima hal yang tidak diberikan kepada seorang nabi pun sebelumku... salah satunya adalah setiap nabi diutus hanya kepada kaumnya saja sedangkan aku diutus kepada seluruh umat manusia.' (Diriwayatkan oleh al-Bukhari dan Muslim.) Wajib atas setiap orang sejak zaman Nabi hingga Hari Kiamat untuk beriman kepada dan mengikuti Nabi. Hal ini juga mengandung arti bahwa ajaran Nabi dan Sunnahnya berlaku dan wajib bagi seluruh umat manusia hingga Hari Kiamat — tidak hanya untuk orang-orang Arab pada masanya.

Kedua ketika seseorang mengucapkan syahadat ia bersaksi bahwa ia meyakini dengan pasti bahwa Nabi Muhammad menyampaikan pesan dengan benar menyampaikan semuanya dan menyampaikannya dengan jelas. Allah berfirman: 'Kewajiban Rasul tidak lain hanyalah menyampaikan pesan dengan jelas' (an-Nur: 54). Ketiga ketika seseorang bersaksi bahwa Muhammad adalah Rasulullah ia mengambil tanggung jawab-tanggung jawab tertentu berkenaan dengan Nabi Muhammad. Ketika ia kurang dalam salah satu tanggung jawab ini maka ia kurang dalam pemenuhan penuh kesaksian imannya.
content_en: If he has no love for this shahaadah or if he actually feels hatred for it, he has negated his shahaadah. The true believer puts no one as an equal to Allah in his love. Allah says in the Quran, ,_ .ই\,.,\ "' J :,.-... ,, J ..... ୺ .J. j' ,.. ¢ *,., J J !.... .... l:J! ,., / ,,. আ ॖ ସହ bl..UI ୰I u.P , ୱif ୲· I J / / / "Yet of mankind are some who take unto themselves (objects of worship which they set as) rivals to Allah, loving them with a love like (that which is due to) Allah only. However, those who believe are stauncher in their love of Allah" (al-Baqara 165). Elsewhere Allah says, J J. / J ,,... .... ַj Æ·jJij Өөµ ֨jij ֩j1; 0t5" u jJ .Ii. sև/ֈ1 r1 4i @1_, L-7Я "Say: If your fathers, your sons, your brethren, your wives, your tribe, the wealth you have acquired, merchandise for which you fear that there will be no sale, or dwellings you desire are dearer to you than Allah and His messenger and striving in His way: then wait till Allah brings His command to pass. Allah guides not wrongdoing folk" (al-Taubah 24). The Prophet (peace be upon him) said, Hadith #3: Islam Has Been Built Upon Five [Pillars] "Whoever has three characteristics has tasted the sweetness of faith. [The first of these] is that he loves Allah and His Messenger more than he loves anyone else ... " (Recorded by al-Bukhari and Muslim.) An eighth condition of the shahaadah is that the person who makes the shahaadah must deny every other object of worship. Although that is clear in the words of the testimony of faith, it does not seem clear to everyone who makes that testimony. Therefore, it needs to be mentioned explicitly. In surah al-Baqara, Allah reminds Muslims of this important aspect of the shahaadah. The shahaadah is not merely an affirmation but it is both an affirmation and a negation. Allah states, .,. .,. .,. ,,. .,. o(f I -::{(1 _ , \2\l "'J! .... [ "Say [O Muhammad]: 0 mankind! Verily, I am sent to you all as the Messenger of Allah" (al-Araaf 158). Furthermore, the Prophet (peace be upon him) said, 1 In preparing this section, the author once again benefited greatly from ibn Jibreen, al­ Shahadataan, pp. 29-76. Hadith #3: Islam Has Been Built Upon Five [Pillars] "I have been given five aspects that were not given to any prophet before me ... [One of which is] every prophet was sent only to his people while I have been sent to all of mankind." (Recorded by al-Bukhari and Muslim.) It is obligatory upon everyone from the time of the Prophet (peace be upon him) until the Day of Judgment to believe in and follow the Prophet (peace be upon him). If the message of Islam clearly reaches a person and he still refuses to believe in and follow the Prophet (peace be upon him), he is a disbeliever and will be in the Hell-fire foreverunless he repents and embraces Islam. However, this also implies that the Prophet's teachings and his sunnah are valid and obligatory upon all of mankind until the Day of Judgment. That is, his example and teaching was not simply for the people of Arabia at his time. Instead, it is just as valid and just as important for each and every Muslim today, whether he be in New York or Malaysia. Some people seem to try to resist the idea that they have to follow the Prophet (peace be upon him). When they do so, they must realize that they are going against what they have testified to. They have testified that the Prophet's message, which includes both the Quran and his inspired sunnah, is for all of mankindincluding each and everyone alive today. Third, when one declares the shahaadah, he is testifying that he believes with certainty that the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) conveyed the messagehe conveyed it correctly, he conveyed all of it, and he conveyed it clearly. Allah says in the Quran, J .,,., ,,.. ., ,J ;;;:; ,., / f\ tw1 ') Ӧӧ'\ o t.:j "The Messenger's duty is only to convey (the message) in a clear way" (al­ Noor 54). The Prophet (peace be upon him) himself said, rP J ,,,, ,,.. J ,.. Q ,,,. J / :'.!J.JlA ")}\ ǵ r:.ଳ;:.. · . ' ")} lA 1 -: ^ Hadith #3: Islam Has Been Built Upon Five (Pillars] says, "I testify that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah," he is taking on certain responsibilities with respect to the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him). When he is lacking in any of these responsibilities, then he is lacking in his complete fulfillment of his testimony of faith. It can even get to the point that he negates his shahaadah completely by refusing to fulfill his responsibility to the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).
